MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. PAUL ARSHAWSKY OF ZANGHI TORRES ARSHAWSKY LLP, TEL. 977-0444 FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY;
CHRISTINE CURRY, TEL. 571-1522, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.

RULING: A G U E D. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/AL)
